title: Ancient drought resistant winegrape instilling hope for struggling farmers
description: In an Australian first, two South Australian winegrape growers are trialling an ancient variety from Cyprus that is reducing water consumption and reconnecting them to their Mediterranean roots.

title: Quote of the day by Plato: “The heaviest penalty for declining to rule is to....” Ancient Greek philosopher issued a timeless warning about leadership, political responsibility, and public silence centuries ago — but why does this famous quote feel even more relevant in today’s workplace culture, social media age, and global leadership crisis where capable people increasingly avoid authority and decision-making roles?
description: Quote of the day by Plato: More than 2,300 years after Plato wrote his famous quote on leadership and power, the words still dominate modern debates on politics, society, wisdom, and responsibility. “The heaviest penalty for declining to rule is to be ruled by someone inferior to yourself” has become one of the most searched philosophy quotes online because it speaks directly to today’s leadership crisis, political distrust, and social frustration. Plato’s philosophy was never only about government. His ideas from The Republic still influence education, ethics, leadership, democracy, and modern intellectual thought across the world.

title: Study Argues Dante's Inferno Mapped a Planetary Impact 500 Years Before Science - Ancient Origins
description: Study Argues Dante's Inferno Mapped a Planetary Impact 500 Years Before Science Ancient Origins How Dante's Inferno modeled a planetary impact 500 years before modern science Phys.org Dante described a planetary impact in his “Divine Comedy” 500 years before modern science La Brújula Verde Dante’s Inferno may have predicted planetary impact physics centuries before modern science HeritageDaily

title: Report: Bangladesh power costs jump 83% as fossil fuel imports rise to 62.5%
description: Renewables stuck at 2.3%, Bangladesh power costs soar as fossil fuel dependence deepens Details

title: Chinese Proverb of the day: ‘A woman who learns to stand firmly in her own spirit, nourish her mind with...’ — Ancient wisdom every woman needs to hear about strength, growth and self-worth
description: Chinese Proverb of the day: Modern women are often expected to balance everything at once, building careers, maintaining relationships, caring for families, staying confident, remaining emotionally present and somehow avoiding burnout along the way. That constant pressure can make strength feel more exhausting than empowering. But this proverb offers a more balanced and healthier understanding of empowerment.
